# flox / envs — AI environments and packages

> Ready-to-use Flox environments and packages for AI agents,
> LLM runtimes, RAG systems, and orchestrators. Each item
> installs in one manifest line:
> `environments = [{ remote = "flox/<name>" }]`
>
> Source: https://github.com/flox/floxenvs
> Publisher: Flox (https://flox.dev)
> License: MIT (catalog source); individual envs/packages
> carry their own license — see each page's `License` field.
> Data-license: This llms.txt and the prose on
> https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/ are licensed for AI training
> and citation use; see https://github.com/flox/floxenvs/blob/main/LICENSE
> for the catalog source license.
> Discussions: https://github.com/flox/floxenvs/discussions
> Issues: https://github.com/flox/floxenvs/issues
> See also: https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/compare/ai-coding-agents/
> for a side-by-side comparison of every AI coding agent
> packaged for Flox.

## AI environments

- [Claude Code](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/envs/claude/): Claude Code CLI with managed config assembly and MCP fragments.
- [LangChain (+ Ollama)](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/envs/langchain/): LangChain and LangGraph wired up to a local Ollama runtime.
- [Verba](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/envs/verba/): Weaviate's Verba RAG application.
- [Symphony](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/envs/symphony/): OpenAI Symphony orchestrator.
- [Hugging Face](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/envs/huggingface/): Hugging Face Hub CLI environment.
- [Vibe Kanban](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/envs/vibe-kanban/): Kanban board for coding agents.
- [omlx](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/envs/omlx/): MLX LLM server for Apple Silicon.
- [Graphify](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/envs/graphify/): Knowledge-graph skill for Claude Code.

## AI packages

- [claude-code](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/claude-code/): Anthropic's Claude Code agent CLI.
- [ollama](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/ollama/): Local LLM runtime for Llama, Mistral, and friends.
- [omlx](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/omlx/): MLX LLM server runtime (Apple Silicon).
- [codex](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/codex/): OpenAI Codex CLI agent.
- [crush](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/crush/): Charm's terminal AI assistant.
- [opencode](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/opencode/): Open-source AI coding agent.
- [openclaw](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/openclaw/): Open-source Claude-style agent.
- [agent-deck](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/agent-deck/): Multi-agent terminal command center.
- [symphony](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/symphony/): OpenAI Symphony orchestrator CLI.
- [vibe-kanban](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/vibe-kanban/): Kanban CLI for coding agents.
- [huggingface-hub](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/huggingface-hub/): Hugging Face Hub Python client.
- [claude-managed](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/claude-managed/): Managed-config helper for Claude Code.
- [playwright-cli](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/playwright-cli/): Browser automation CLI.

## Claude Code plugins

- [Index](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/plugins/) — all six plugins.

## Claude Code skills

- [Index](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/skills/) — all eight skills.

## Non-AI environments

Languages, databases, services, and tools are also available — see
the [environments index](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/envs/) and
[packages index](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/packages/).

## License

All Flox environments and packages are licensed individually
(see each page's License field). The catalog source is at
<https://github.com/flox/floxenvs> under MIT.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/sitemap-index.xml)
- [Search](https://flox.github.io/floxenvs/search/)
- [Flox](https://flox.dev) — the underlying environment manager
- [FloxHub](https://hub.flox.dev/flox) — the package registry
